notes: Best overall performer across languages; ideal production candidate if runtime budget permits.
Slightly higher scores than e5-base but slower; use when extra accuracy outweighs latency.
Excellent overall match quality with fast HY convergence; great trade-off between accuracy and cost.
Strong cross-lingual coverage and good HY synonyms; higher latency but reliable fallback.
Armenian-tuned model raises HY scores but still trails multilingual-e5 in RU/EN.
English-optimized variant underperforms on HY; acceptable only when HY coverage is secondary.
Multilingual specialist but lags on cross-language averaging; keeps HY acceptable.
Same embedding quality as ST variant with faster inference via FlagEmbedding; good for local deployments.
Legacy e5 shows weaker cross-lingual lift; consider migrating to multilingual-e5 family.
Solid multilingual baseline but Armenian alignment remains moderate; consider for quick sanity checks only.
Balanced latency and accuracy yet still trails stronger HY-capable models.
Lightweight model with noticeably weaker HY alignment; better options available for production.
Strong English/Russian alignment but HY performance collapses; not suitable for tri-lingual EPG without fine-tuning.
English-centric MiniLM misses RU/HY semantics entirely; avoid for multilingual scenarios.
